---
title: Now
date: 2022-12-26
# description-meta: Guorui is working on a bunch of exciting and groundbreaking projects
published-title: Last updated
title-block-banner: "#212529"
toc: true
toc-location: left
toc-title: "Contents"
---

## 2023

Living in Singapore and working as an research fellow in the Complex Phenotype Analysis Group at the [Bioinformatics institute (BII)](https://www.a-star.edu.sg/bii), [A*STAR](https://www.a-star.edu.sg/).

- Earning money to marry Miss Zhou Haiyan (She is doing her Ph.D in [University of Hong Kong](https://www.hku.hk/)).
- Learning High-throughput phenotypic profiling from mentor [Dr. Loo Lit-Hsin](http://web.bii.a-star.edu.sg/~loolh/).
- Learning to write papers, grants and apply grant for independent research.
- Improving R coding skills.
